_fixture_notes: Case 20 (spec gap): Recipe with ingredients: []. The spec describes 'Array of ingredient rows' without stating a minimum length. The validator rule 'every {NNNN} placeholder must resolve' is vacuously satisfied with no ingredients (no placeholders to resolve). Tests whether the validator enforces a minimum of one ingredient and how downstream features (shopping list, ingredient consistency check) behave with zero rows.
name: Pasta With Whatever You Have
description: Zero-ingredient recipe for testing whether the validator allows an empty ingredient list.

steps.title: Improvise
steps.content: Cook pasta and toss with whatever sauce ingredients are on hand. Season to taste.
